summary: A cloud-routed printing service that enables remote Windows print jobs to be printed on local printers. Print jobs are routed through a cloud service similar to Ezeep Cloud, allowing users to print from any location to any connected printer without requiring direct network access.

user_stories.i_want: print documents from my remote Windows computer to my home printer
user_stories.so_that: I can get physical copies of documents without being physically present
acceptance_criteria: User can install a lightweight print server agent on any network with printers
User can install a print client on remote Windows machines
Print jobs appear on the remote computer's print queue
Print jobs are securely transmitted through the cloud to the destination printer
User receives confirmation when print job completes
Print job status is visible in real-time

user_stories.i_want: manage users and their printer permissions centrally
user_stories.so_that: I can control who can print to which printers
acceptance_criteria: Admin can invite users to the organization
Admin can assign printers to users or groups
Admin can view print job history and usage statistics
Admin can disable printers or users
Admin can set print quotas per user

user_stories.i_want: view my print job history and current status
user_stories.so_that: I can track my printing activity and troubleshoot issues
acceptance_criteria: User can view list of all print jobs submitted
User can see current status (queued, processing, completed, failed)
User can see page count and document name for each job
User can cancel pending print jobs
User can re-submit failed print jobs

user_stories.i_want: the agent to auto-discover printers on the local network
user_stories.so_that: I don't have to manually configure each printer
acceptance_criteria: Agent discovers network printers via mDNS/Bonjour
Agent discovers USB printers connected to the host machine
Agent can test printer connectivity
User can enable/disable specific printers for cloud printing

user_stories.i_want: print documents from my phone to a remote printer
user_stories.so_that: I can print without needing a computer
acceptance_criteria: Mobile app available for iOS and Android
User can select documents from cloud storage or device
User can select destination printer
User receives push notification on completion

user_stories.i_want: all print jobs encrypted in transit and at rest
user_stories.so_that: my sensitive documents cannot be intercepted
acceptance_criteria: All communication uses TLS 1.3
Print jobs are encrypted with end-to-end encryption
Stored print jobs are encrypted at rest
Authentication required for all operations
Option for print job to auto-delete after printing

user_stories.i_want: select which printer to use for each job
user_stories.so_that: I can route to the appropriate printer (color, duplex, etc.)
acceptance_criteria: Print dialog shows all available printers
Each printer shows its capabilities (color, duplex, paper size)
User can set default printer
User can save printer preferences

user_stories.i_want: the system to handle printer driver requirements automatically
user_stories.so_that: I don't have to install drivers on my remote computer
acceptance_criteria: Cloud service maintains printer driver library
Print jobs are rendered on the agent side with correct driver
Client installs a universal print driver
System supports PDF-based printing fallback

functional_requirements.title: Print Server Agent
functional_requirements.description: Lightweight agent that runs on a machine connected to printers, receives print jobs from cloud, and sends them to local printers using native OS printing APIs

functional_requirements.title: Print Client Driver
functional_requirements.description: Virtual printer driver for Windows that intercepts print jobs, converts to PDF, and uploads to cloud service for routing

functional_requirements.title: Cloud Print Router
functional_requirements.description: Central service that receives print jobs from clients, queues them, and delivers to available agents based on destination printer selection

functional_requirements.title: User Authentication & Authorization
functional_requirements.description: OAuth2/OIDC based authentication with role-based access control for users, admins, and organizations

functional_requirements.title: Printer Registration & Discovery
functional_requirements.description: System for agents to register discovered printers, maintain printer capabilities, and heartbeat status

functional_requirements.title: Print Job Queue Management
functional_requirements.description: Queue system for pending, processing, completed, and failed print jobs with retry logic and job prioritization

functional_requirements.title: Real-time Job Status
functional_requirements.description: WebSocket-based real-time status updates for print job progress from client to agent to completion

functional_requirements.title: Print Job Storage
functional_requirements.description: Temporary secure storage of print job data with automatic expiration and encryption at rest

functional_requirements.title: Usage Analytics & Reporting
functional_requirements.description: Track print jobs, page counts, user activity, and generate usage reports for billing and monitoring

functional_requirements.title: Organization Management
functional_requirements.description: Multi-tenant support for organizations with admin controls, user management, and printer sharing within groups

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Print job upload completes within 10 seconds for typical 10-page document
Print job routing from cloud to agent completes within 5 seconds
non_functional_requirements.metric: p95 latency < 5s from upload to agent receipt
AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit

non_functional_requirements.requirement: No print job data retained after successful printing
System must support concurrent print jobs across all users
non_functional_requirements.metric: 1000+ concurrent print jobs, 10,000+ jobs per hour

non_functional_requirements.requirement: Cloud service must be highly available
Agent must stay connected with minimal overhead
Audit logging for all print operations

api_endpoints.description: Authenticate user and receive JWT tokens
List all printers available to current user
List user's print jobs with filtering
Get details of a specific print job

risks.risk: Print job data contains sensitive information that could be exposed if cloud service is compromised
risks.mitigation: Implement end-to-end encryption where only the client and agent can decrypt print jobs. Cloud service only routes encrypted payloads.

risks.risk: Print jobs may be delivered to wrong printer
risks.mitigation: Implement printer fingerprinting and confirmation dialog before large jobs. Require printer selection for each job.

risks.risk: Agent connectivity issues could prevent print jobs from completing
risks.mitigation: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff, queue jobs for up to 24 hours, notify users of delivery failures.

risks.risk: Windows printer driver compatibility issues on agent side
risks.mitigation: Use PDF as universal intermediate format. Maintain compatibility matrix. Fallback to generic PDF-to-printer rendering.

risks.risk: Scalability bottleneck in job routing during peak usage
risks.mitigation: Use message queue (RabbitMQ/Kafka) for job distribution. Horizontal scaling of router service instances.

risks.risk: Storage costs grow unbounded if print jobs are not cleaned up
risks.mitigation: Implement TTL-based auto-deletion. Lifecycle policies on object storage. Monitor and alert on storage growth.

risks.risk: Denial of service via large print job uploads
risks.mitigation: Implement file size limits (e.g., 100MB per job). Rate limiting per user. Quarantine for suspicious patterns.

implementation_phases.name: Foundation
tasks: Set up project structure with TypeScript monorepo
Build basic API gateway and documentation

implementation_phases.name: Print Agent
tasks: Create agent registration and heartbeat API
Build secure websocket connection to cloud

implementation_phases.name: Print Client
tasks: Create virtual printer driver for Windows
Implement print job capture and PDF conversion

implementation_phases.name: Cloud Routing
tasks: Build job routing logic to match jobs to agents
Create job status tracking and updates
Implement secure job storage and delivery

implementation_phases.name: Management UI
tasks: Build web dashboard for print job history

implementation_phases.name: Security & Hardening
tasks: Implement end-to-end encryption for print jobs
Add audit logging for all operations
Implement rate limiting and abuse prevention
